 <rdf:Description rdf:about=''
  xmlns:dc='http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/'>
  <dc:description>
   <rdf:Alt>
    <rdf:li xml:lang='x-default'>Map with a pin isolated on white. Fully transparent. Any background can be used.</rdf:li>
   </rdf:Alt>
  </dc:description>
